aboutSection.title: Designed and Made Locally
aboutSection.description1: Our country is rich in culture, nature, and heritage,
aboutSection.description2: we choose to create locally, so home travels with us...

brandSection.text: Born from a Tunisian instinct for simple joy. Jawista lives in the moments that matter : Sand, Sea, Breath and connection. A mindset of presence, where life is felt, not just lived.

hero.description: We named Jawista after something deeply rooted in the Tunisian spirit — that instinct to seek Jaw, to live fully in the moment, and to find beauty in the simplest things. ("Jaw" meaning joy or good vibes in local dialect) A Jawista is someone who doesn't just pass through life, but feels it. The warmth of sand underfoot, the rhythm of waves, a shared laugh, a quiet breath at sunrise. It's a mindset shaped by presence, but also by awareness — noticing the small details others overlook, and turning them into meaningful moments. We all seek joy in the details, the small rituals and habits that make each moment yours.
hero.title: The one who knows how to enjoy.

community.label: Step into Jawista.
community.description: Fresh drops, hidden details, and what happens behind the scenes.

heroSection.title: The one who knows how to enjoy
heroSection.description: We named Jawista after something deeply rooted in the Tunisian spirit — that instinct to seek Jaw, to live fully in the moment, and to find beauty in the simplest things. ("Jaw" meaning joy or good vibes in local dialect) A Jawista is someone who doesn't just pass through life, but feels it. The warmth of sand underfoot, the rhythm of waves, a shared laugh, a quiet breath at sunrise. It's a mindset shaped by presence, but also by awareness — noticing the small details others overlook, and turning them into meaningful moments. We all seek joy in the details, the small rituals and habits that make each moment yours.

defaults.centerText: The one who knows how to enjoy

storySection.subtitle: (     our story     )
storySection.mainText: Designed for the moment, shaped by the way you live it.
storySection.paragraph: We started Jawista from a simple feeling the things we use every day rarely reflect how we actually experience life. They work, but they don't feel. Especially around moments that matter to us, like the beach, movement, or time shared with others. Everything felt either too generic or disconnected from the way we see and enjoy the world. At the same time, our connection to these moments runs deep. The simplicity of being present. The attention to small details. The quiet balance between movement and pause. These are the things that make an experience real… and memorable. Jawista is our way of bringing that mindset into what we create. Objects that are made to be used, but also to be felt. A brand for people who move, pause, notice, and enjoy things in their own way. We're not trying to redefine anything just to make space for a more honest, more human way of living the moment.

summary.title: Order Summary

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content:
At JAWISTA CLUB, your privacy is important to us.

This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.content:
We may collect the following information:
  • Name
  • Phone number
  • Delivery address
  • Order-related information

useOfData.title: Use of Data
useOfData.content:
Your data is used strictly for:
  • Processing orders
  • Delivery services
  • Customer support
  • Improving your experience

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.content:
We do not share your personal data with third parties, except:
  • With your consent
  • When required by law

security.title: Security
security.content:
We implement appropriate security measures to protect your data.

However, no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.

externalLinks.title: External Links
externalLinks.content:
Our website may contain links to external websites.

We are not responsible for their privacy practices.

consent.title: Consent
consent.content: By using our website, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

generalConditions.title: General Conditions
generalConditions.content:
At JAWISTA CLUB, we aim to ensure customer satisfaction.

Products may be eligible for replacement or refund under the conditions outlined below.

returnConditions.title: Return Conditions
returnConditions.content:
To be eligible for a return, the product must be:
  • In its original condition
  • Unused
  • In its original packaging

timeframes.title: Timeframes
timeframes.content:
• Refunds: processed within 3 days after approval
  • Replacements: processed within 7 days

fullRefund.title: Full Refund
fullRefund.content:
A full refund will be issued if:
  • The product received is different from the one ordered
  • The product has a major defect

returnsWithoutDefect.title: Returns Without Defect
returnsWithoutDefect.content:
If the product is returned without any defect:
  • A deduction of 30% of the product price will be applied
  • Or a minimum of 25 TND

contact.title: Contact
contact.content:
To request a return or refund, please contact us via:
  • The "Contact" page
  • Our official contact details

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.content:
JAWISTA CLUB delivers across Tunisia.

Shipping details and estimated delivery times will be provided at checkout.

processingTime.title: Processing Time
processingTime.content: Orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days after confirmation.

shippingRates.title: Shipping Rates
shippingRates.content:
Shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on your delivery location.

Free shipping promotions may apply during special campaigns.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.content: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive tracking information via email or SMS.

lostDamaged.title: Lost or Damaged Packages
lostDamaged.content: If your package is lost or arrives damaged, please contact us immediately via the "Contact" page so we can assist you.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content:
Welcome to JAWISTA CLUB.

These Terms & Conditions govern your use of our website and all related services. By accessing this site, you agree to be bound by these terms.

We reserve the right to modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Any changes will take effect immediately upon being published on the website.

useOfWebsite.title: Use of the Website
useOfWebsite.content:
You must be at least 18 years old to use this website, or under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian.

You are granted a limited, non-transferable, and non-commercial license to use this website for personal purposes only. Any misuse or unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.

ordersPricing.title: Orders & Pricing
ordersPricing.content:
We strive to ensure that all information on the website (products, pricing, availability) is accurate.

However, we reserve the right to:
  • Refuse or cancel any order
  • Correct any errors in pricing or product descriptions
This may occur even after an order has been confirmed.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content:
All content on this website (logos, text, images, products, and design) is the exclusive property of JAWISTA CLUB.

Any reproduction or use without prior authorization is strictly prohibited.

liability.title: Liability
liability.content: We are not responsible for any damage resulting from improper use of our products.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the website at any time if these terms are violated.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content:
These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of Tunisia.

Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Tunisian courts.
